top_signals.title: Rheinmetall gambled on Germany’s doomed warship project — and lost
top_signals.summary: Arms company’s €15bn frigate blow tests faith among investors
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FMCSA says: Less paper, more enforcement
top_signals.summary:
FMCSA is stripping out compliance noise with one hand and chasing chameleon carriers with the other. The trick is keeping the two in balance.

The post FMCSA says: Less paper, more enforcement appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: American Ocean Minerals finishes first offshore exploration mission in Cook Islands
top_signals.summary: AOMC has a definitive merger agreement with Odyssey Marine Exploration, in a deal expected to create a US-controlled deep-sea critical minerals company valued at $1 billion.
